sentences.target: J'ai oublié mon carnet dans le taxi.
sentences.reading: /ʒe u.bli.je mɔ̃ kaʁ.nɛ dɑ̃ lə tak.si./

translations.fr: J'ai oublié mon carnet dans le taxi.
translations.ipa: /ʒe u.bli.je mɔ̃ kaʁ.nɛ dɑ̃ lə tak.si./
translations.en: I forgot my notebook in the taxi.
translations.es: Olvidé mi cuaderno en el taxi.
translations.de: Ich habe mein Notizbuch im Taxi vergessen.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato il mio taccuino nel taxi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把本子忘在出租车上了。
translations.yue: 我喺的士度遺低咗我本簿仔。
translations.ru: Я забыл свой блокнот в такси.
translations.vi: Tôi quên sổ tay trong taxi.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn notitieboekje in de taxi vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув свій блокнот у таксі.
translations.hi: मेरी कापी टैक्सी में रह गई.
translations.el: Ξέχασα το σημειωματάριό μου στο ταξί.
translations.nb: Jeg glemte notatboken min i taxien.
translations.id: Saya lupa buku catatan saya di taksi.
translations.sv: Jag glömde min anteckningsbok i taxin.
translations.ro: Am uitat caietul meu în taxi.
translations.da: Jeg glemte min notesbog i taxaen.
translations.ja: タクシーにノートを置き忘れました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (present, 1st sg) forming the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the main lexical verb; complements the auxiliary to form the compound tense.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), modifying the noun 'carnet' (masculine singular).
Common noun; direct object of 'oublié'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article (masculine singular) determiner for 'taxi'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu peux noter l'adresse dans ce carnet.
sentences.reading: /ty pø nɔ.te la.dʁɛs dɑ̃ sə kaʁ.nɛ./

translations.fr: Tu peux noter l'adresse dans ce carnet.
translations.ipa: /ty pø nɔ.te la.dʁɛs dɑ̃ sə kaʁ.nɛ./
translations.en: You can write the address in this notebook.
translations.es: Puedes anotar la dirección en este cuaderno.
translations.de: Du kannst die Adresse in dieses Notizbuch schreiben.
translations.it: Puoi scrivere l'indirizzo su questo taccuino.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把地址记在这个本子上。
translations.yue: 你可以喺呢本簿仔度寫低個地址。
translations.ru: Ты можешь записать адрес в этот блокнот.
translations.pt: Você pode anotar o endereço neste caderno.
translations.he: אתה יכול לרשום את הכתובת במחברת הזאת.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể ghi địa chỉ vào sổ tay này.
translations.ar: يمكنك كتابة العنوان في هذا الدفتر.
translations.nl: Je kunt het adres in dit notitieboekje opschrijven.
translations.uk: Ти можеш записати адресу в цей блокнот.
translations.hu: Felírhatod a címet ebbe a jegyzetfüzetbe.
translations.hi: तुम इस कापी में पता लिख सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz zapisać adres w tym notesie.
translations.el: Μπορείς να σημειώσεις τη διεύθυνση σε αυτό το σημειωματάριο.
translations.nb: Du kan skrive adressen i denne notatboken.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menulis alamat di buku catatan ini.
translations.sv: Du kan skriva adressen i den här anteckningsboken.
translations.ro: Poți să notezi adresa în acest caiet.
translations.cs: Můžeš si zapsat adresu do tohoto zápisníku.
translations.da: Du kan skrive adressen i denne notesbog.
translations.ja: このノートに住所を書いていいよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 2nd person singular.
Finite verb (present, 2nd sg) functioning as a modal governing the infinitive 'noter'.
Infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal 'peux'.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of 'adresse' (direct object of 'noter').
Common noun; head of the noun phrase that is the direct object of 'noter'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) for 'carnet'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Son carnet est plein de listes.

translations.fr: Son carnet est plein de listes.
translations.en: His notebook is full of lists.
translations.es: Su cuaderno está lleno de listas.
translations.it: Il suo taccuino è pieno de liste.
translations.yue: 佢本簿仔入面全部都係清單。
translations.pt: O caderno dele está cheio de listas.
translations.vi: Sổ tay của anh ấy đầy danh sách.
translations.nl: Zijn notitieboekje staat vol met lijstjes.
translations.hi: उसकी कापी सूचियों से भरी हुई है.
translations.el: Το σημειωματάριό του είναι γεμάτο λίστες.
translations.nb: Notatboken hans er full av lister.
translations.sv: Hans anteckningsbok är full av listor.
translations.ro: Caietul lui este plin de liste.
translations.da: Hans notesbog er fuld af lister.
translations.ja: 彼のノートはリストでいっぱいだ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agreeing with the masculine singular noun 'carnet'.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; head of the predicative complement selected by the copula.
Preposition introducing the complement of the adjective 'plein'.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'de' specifying the content.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons ce carnet depuis ce matin.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁ.ʃɔ̃ sə kaʁ.nɛ də.pɥi sə ma.tɛ̃./

translations.fr: Nous cherchons ce carnet depuis ce matin.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁ.ʃɔ̃ sə kaʁ.nɛ də.pɥi sə ma.tɛ̃./
translations.en: We have been looking for this notebook since morning.
translations.es: Estamos buscando este cuaderno desde esta mañana.
translations.de: Wir suchen dieses Notizbuch seit heute Morgen.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando questo taccuino da stamattina.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침부터 이 노트를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们从今天早上一直在找这本本子。
translations.yue: 我哋由今朝開始一直搵緊呢本簿仔。
translations.ru: Мы ищем этот блокнот с самого утра.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando este caderno desde hoje de manhã.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את המחברת הזו מאז הבוקר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã tìm sổ tay này từ sáng đến giờ.
translations.ar: نبحث عن هذا الدفتر منذ الصباح.
translations.nl: We zoeken dit notitieboekje sinds vanmorgen.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо цей блокнот із самого ранку.
translations.hu: Reggel óta keressük ezt a jegyzetfüzetet.
translations.hi: हम सुबह से इस कापी को ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε αυτό το σημειωματάριο από το πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi har lett etter denne notatboken siden i morges.
translations.id: Kami sudah mencari buku catatan ini sejak pagi.
translations.sv: Vi har letat efter den här anteckningsboken sedan i morse.
translations.ro: Căutăm acest caiet încă de azi-dimineață.
translations.da: Vi har ledt efter denne notesbog siden i morges.
translations.fi: Olemme etsineet tätä muistikirjaa aamusta asti.
translations.ja: 今朝からこのノートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 1st person plural.
Finite verb (present, 1st pl); main predicate of the clause.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'carnet'.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement indicating the starting point.
Demonstrative determiner for 'matin'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'depuis' within the temporal phrase.
